title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track days in advance, enabling timely evacuation warnings in Jamaica. The model demonstrated high-confidence storm prediction capabilities in collaboration with the National Hurricane Center.
